Fixed. Here's the full summary:

---

**Root Cause:** The `/mnt/data/hello-world` directory — which contains `index.html` and all static site files — had been deleted from disk (342 files, all tracked by git). `clunger.service` was running fine and serving correctly, but every GET to `/` and any static path fell through to the 404 handler because the files were missing.

**Action:** Restored all 342 deleted files via `git checkout -- hello-world/` in the `/mnt/data` repo. No service restart was ...(truncated)
